mapper.select:
select * from seckill_activity
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into seckill_activity(name, description, start_time, end_time, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values(#{name}, #{description}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
